queries.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS operations ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, client_id INTEGER NOT NULL, type_operation_id INTEGER NOT NULL, destinataire VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL, montant DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL, frais DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00, date_operation DATETIME NOT NULL )
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS types_operation ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, nom VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE )
